column1: # 首批:主選單 / 休息系統 / 版權 / 天空。英文(可省尾空白) <TAB> 中文
The software you are now using was produced through the efforts of many people: designers, artists, programmers, musicians, and lots of other hard-working folks.
column2: 您現在使用的這套軟體,是由許多人共同努力打造的成果:設計師、美術、程式設計師、音樂家,以及許多辛勤付出的夥伴。

column1: If you make copies of this software for any reason other than to make a personal backup, you are not only breaking the law, but raising the cost of software for all legitimate users.  PLEASE DO NOT MAKE ILLEGAL COPIES OF THIS GAME!
column2: 若你基於個人備份以外的任何理由複製本軟體,不僅觸犯法律,更會推高所有正當使用者的軟體成本。請勿非法複製本遊戲!

column1: Oh, by the way . . .  You will need the information contained in the printed documentation to successfully complete this game.  In other words, it's not just the law . . . It's a good idea.
column2: 對了…你會需要印刷手冊裡的資訊,才能順利完成本遊戲。換句話說,這不只是法律問題…也是個好主意。

column1: You just can't sleep during the daytime.
You awake as the sun begins to rise.
You're too impatient to rest right now.
column2: 你現在太焦躁,靜不下來休息。
